free_text: Pair correlations in nuclei involved in neutrinoless
double beta decay: 76Ge and 76Se.
The Open University,Milton Keynes
Experiment was performed at Yale ESTU
tandem Van de Graaf accelerator.
76,74Ge and 78,76Se targets with thicknesses between
160 and 400 mu-g/cm2.
Enge split-pole spectrograph was used for the
measurements with a focal-plane detector that cleanly
separates tritons from other reaction products.
Two Si surface barrier detectors at +-32deg
were used as monitors
Total uncertainty
Systematic uncertainty include uncertainties in
- constancy of the beam spot on target
- accuracy of angle determinations in the monitors
- possible small drifts in monitor calibration
- possible inefficiency in the focal plane detector
- uniformity of target thickness
Statistical uncertainty
Compiled by S.H.
